codeReview.summary: The WebKitGTK browser feature is fully implemented and functional. The implementation provides a complete browser view with WebKit2GTK, supporting web content rendering, navigation controls (back/forward/reload/stop), URL bar with search support, and horizontal/vertical split views with the terminal. All five validation assertions (VAL-BROWSER-001 through VAL-BROWSER-005) are properly implemented.

issues.description: Minor GTK warning about delete-event signal - test code issue, not critical to production functionality. Consider updating to use close-request signal for GTK4 compatibility.
Minor GTK warning about gtk_widget_get_parent during cleanup - test code issue, tests still pass. Consider adding null checks before calling gtk_widget_get_parent in destroy handlers.

summary: PASS - The browser-webkitgtk-fix feature successfully implements WebKitGTK browser functionality with proper web content rendering, navigation controls, URL bar navigation, and horizontal/vertical split views. All validation assertions (VAL-BROWSER-001 through VAL-BROWSER-005) are covered. The commit d59b806 rebuilds binaries with fixed VTE include path. The only issues found are minor non-blocking warnings in test code.
